summary: The README.md is mostly accurate but contains several inconsistencies with recent code changes, particularly around WebRTC functionality, Command Pattern implementation, and service method implementations.

findings.notes: All mentioned features are present in the codebase including WebRTC signaling support, command pattern, and buffer pooling.
Architecture accurately reflects the current state with CGO deprecated and gRPC as primary integration path.
Layer structure diagram accurately represents the current codebase organization.

issues.claim: StartVideoPlayback and StopVideoPlayback methods are listed as implemented service methods
issues.reality: These methods are defined in the proto file but NOT implemented in ImageProcessorServiceImpl. The class only implements: ProcessImage, ListFilters, StreamProcessVideo, and GetVersionInfo
issues.evidence: src/cpp_accelerator/ports/grpc/image_processor_service_impl.h shows only 4 implemented methods. grep shows no StartVideoPlayback/StopVideoPlayback implementation in the codebase.

recommended_changes: Remove StartVideoPlayback and StopVideoPlayback from the service methods list (lines 399-405)
Clarify that WebRTC functionality is handled through the separate WebRTCSignalingService and WebRTCManager components
Update the service architecture description to reflect the actual separation between image processing and WebRTC signaling

findings.notes: WebRTC components (WebRTCManager, WebRTCSignalingServiceImpl, LiveVideoProcessor) are all present and accurately described. Proto service definitions match the implementation.

issues.claim: CommandFactory creates commands based on ProgramType enum with Passthrough, CudaImageFilters, and CpuImageFilters
issues.reality: CommandFactory::register_commands() is EMPTY. The comment states 'all commands have been migrated to FilterPipeline. This factory is kept as a placeholder for future command implementations if needed.'

recommended_changes: Update the Command Pattern section to reflect that it's currently a placeholder/stub
Remove the detailed descriptions of command types (Passthrough, CudaImageFilters, CpuImageFilters) since they are not implemented
Add a note explaining that FilterPipeline is now the primary mechanism for command execution
Update the ProgramConfig section to reflect that commands are created directly via FilterPipeline rather than through CommandFactory

issues.claim: Directory structure shows filters/ and processors/ as subdirectories under domain/interfaces/
issues.reality: These directories exist but are mostly empty symbolic placeholders. The actual filter interfaces are in domain/interfaces/i_filter.h
issues.evidence: domain/interfaces/filters/ contains only i_filter.h, domain/interfaces/processors/ contains only i_image_processor.h

findings.notes: Overall directory structure is accurate. The filters/ and processors/ subdirectories exist but contain minimal interface definitions.

issues.evidence: All BUILD files are under src/cpp_accelerator/ directory structure

recommended_changes: Update all bazel test commands to use //src/cpp_accelerator/... instead of //cpp_accelerator/...

issues.evidence: BUILD file locations confirm src/ prefix is required

recommended_changes: Update bazel build commands to use correct //src/cpp_accelerator/... paths
Verify all bazel target references throughout the document

findings.notes: VERSION file contains 2.4.2 and C API version 2.1.0 as documented. Version separation is correctly explained.

missing_information.description: Could add more details about how WebRTCManager integrates with the gRPC server and how LiveVideoProcessor handles H.264 encoding/decoding
Could expand on how FilterPipeline has replaced the Command Pattern for execution orchestration
Could add details about ConfigManager integration with CommandFactory and how it's used in practice

inconsistent_details.issue: StartVideoPlayback/StopVideoPlayback described as implemented but only defined in proto
inconsistent_details.impact: HIGH - Misleads developers about available functionality

inconsistent_details.issue: Command Pattern described as functional but implementation is empty/stub
inconsistent_details.impact: HIGH - Misleads about command execution architecture

inconsistent_details.issue: Bazel paths missing src/ prefix in multiple sections
inconsistent_details.impact: MEDIUM - Commands won't work as documented

strengths: Architecture diagrams accurately reflect Clean Architecture principles
WebRTC component descriptions are detailed and accurate
Domain interfaces and infrastructure implementations are well documented
Version information and API compatibility explanations are clear
Code quality and compiler warning sections are comprehensive

recommended_priority_actions.action: Remove StartVideoPlayback/StopVideoPlayback from service methods list (lines 399-405) or add note about proto-only definition
recommended_priority_actions.reason: These methods are not implemented and mislead users about available functionality

recommended_priority_actions.action: Update Command Pattern section to reflect placeholder status (lines 447-465)
recommended_priority_actions.reason: Current description suggests functional command execution that doesn't exist

recommended_priority_actions.action: Fix all Bazel paths to include src/ prefix (lines 688-719)
recommended_priority_actions.reason: Documented commands won't work, causing user confusion

recommended_priority_actions.action: Clarify that filters/ and processors/ are minimal interface directories
recommended_priority_actions.reason: Minor clarity improvement for directory structure understanding
